description: Product description This sparkling Mini Santa Hat Headband with shimmering red sequins is a fantastic festive accessory for the Christmas season, whether you are celebrating with friends at Christmas parties in the workplace or classroom or at family gatherings around the tree on Christmas morning. The mini Christmas hats sit on the red hairband at a 45-degree angle, which gives an energetically jaunty effect that will delight the wearer and makes the hair accessory perfect for lively nights out as well as sedate Christmas mornings. These glittering hair accessories are a versatile choice for adding a final touch to your Christmas outfit, enhancing festive fancy-dress outfits, playing Sexy Santa, wearing to the office and classroom, or posing for pictures. The spectacularly sparkly sequins on the mini Santa hats twinkle in the light and produce an eye-catching shimmer that is perfect for the holiday spirit, while the vibrant green holly leaf decorations add a splash of colour to the overall look for a suitably festive appearance. The headband is one size and measures approx. 15cm x 5cm x 20cm / 5.9inch x 1.9inch x 7.8inch. A lightweight and durable accessory, the hairbands can be worn indoors and outdoors and are suitable for adults and children aged 14 and up. Recommended for ages 14+. These fancy-dress costume accessories have been tested to EN71 and REACH regulations and are compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements. Safety Warning This is not a toy. WARNING! Keep away from fire. For Adult use only
